sections.paragraph:
Original: כּרה

Transliteration: kârâh

Phonetic: kaw-raw'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Qal) to get by trade, trade, buy, bargain over

Origin: usually assigned as a primitive root, but probably only a special application of H3738 (through the common idea of planning implied in a bargain)

TWOT entry: 1034

Part(s) of speech: Verb
